text:
There was an old farmer who lived alone on the edge of town. Every autumn he'd go fishing at the big lake.

One time he went fishing very early in the morning. When he reached his usual spot he saw something shining. He reached out and grabbed it. It was an owl.

He took it home and put it in an owl cage. Every night the owl would sleep there until morning.

Then one night when no birds were around...

Owl!

He couldn't hear it! He ran outside his house!

What?!

An owl!

Well.

That's my favorite night.

You poor owl.



That story has three owls.

That's bad...

Oh.

It never goes back. Ever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
